utterance: turn on the living room thermostat

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Living Room Thermostat" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOn × climate. Activates the thermostat (switches from off mode to last active mode). Current state: auto.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Office Thermostat" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOff × climate. Sets HVAC mode to off. Current state: heat.

utterance: what mode is the master bedroom thermostat in

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: HassClimateGetTemperature returns the temperature setpoint; HassGetState returns HVAC mode. 'What mode' maps to HassGetState.
Entity name "Master Bedroom Thermostat" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassGetState × climate. Returns HVAC mode (cool). Disambiguation: HassGetState vs HassClimateGetTemperature — 'what mode' maps to HassGetState.

utterance: set the living room temperature to 72

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Area targeting is equally valid when one climate entity exists in the living room.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassClimateSetTemperature × climate. Simple numeric temperature set.

utterance: what's the temperature in the living room

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Dedicated ambient temperature sensor is also present; both return a temperature value for the living room.
Name-based targeting is equally valid when one climate entity exists in the area.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassClimateGetTemperature × climate. Disambiguation: climate entity vs sensor. HassClimateGetTemperature is the optimal path. This is the canonical cross-domain disambiguation example from the generation guide.

utterance: set the wine cooler to 52 degrees

metadata.notes: Step 2: Wine cooler subtype — different temperature range (44-65°F vs 60-85°F for main thermostats). Same domain, same area as kitchen_thermostat. Tests disambiguation between climate.kitchen_thermostat and climate.kitchen_wine_cooler.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Portable Heater" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 2: Arealess climate entity subtype. climate.portable_heater has no area assignment. Must use name-based targeting. Current state: off. Also creates disambiguation with switch.office_space_heater and switch.patio_heater.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Garage Heater" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 2: Garage heater subtype — currently off, heat-only mode (hvac_modes: off/heat). Note: entity_id is climate.garage_thermostat but friendly name is 'Garage Heater'. Confabulation risk: climate.garage_heater does not exist.
